PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-22-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yaasha Sabba and Ed Koplowitz, via Zoom, for Karen James, Petitioner.

The court notes that there are no appearances to object. There being no objections, the Court advises of its intent to the grant Karen James' petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary and confirms with Mr. Koplowitz that his client has confirmed the existence of a will located in a safe deposit box.

The matter is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-22-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Continued To Aug-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yaasha Sabba and Edward Koplowitz, via Zoom, for Karen James, Petitioner; Martin Glickfeld, via Zoom, for and with Donald James, Objector.

The court confirms Mr. Glickfeld's intention to file a motion to withdraw as counsel and that Mr. James intends to continue with his will contest. Messrs. Glickfeld and James offer testimony regarding what led to Mr. Glickfeld's position to withdraw, and Mr. James advises that he intends to hire new counsel. Mr. Koplowitz points to the procedural failures which have caused this matter to be delayed and advises that the attorney who drafted the will has been located as well as witnesses who have testified as to the validity of the will and requests a hearing thereon. The court reminds Mr. James of the history of his previous attorneys having viewed the will and subsequently withdrawing and advises Mr. James that he will need to hire a new attorney to move this matter forward and that the court intends to proceed with a hearing at the next calling of this matter.

After additional discussion, all three (3) matters are continued to Aug-22-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-27-2021 Continued To Dec-08-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Koplowitz and Yaasha Sabba, via ZOOM, for Karen James, via ZOOM, Petitioner; Martin Glickfeld, via ZOOM, for Donald R. James, Objector.

The court queries Mr. Glickfeld regarding why no summons has been issued on his client's petition. Mr. Glickfeld reports that he's encountered issues obtaining a summons and thus one was never issued. Mr. Glickfeld advises that he filed an amended petition and served Mr. Koplowitz. Mr. Koplowitz subsequently filed a verified answer to the amended petition and Mr. Glickfeld now wonders if the summons issue is moot. The court advises Mr. Glickfeld that the probate code regarding serving the summons is clear and accordingly, the matters on calendar will need to be continued to allow for service.

The three (3) matters on today's calendar are continued to Dec-08-2021 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-07-2021 Continued To Aug-18-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Martin Glickfield, via ZOOM, for Donald James, Objector; Ed Koplowitz and Yaasha Sabba, via ZOOM, for Karen James, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court requests an update regarding this matter. Mr. Glickfield advises that he has agreed to represent Mr. James, currently in propria persona, and a substitution of attorney is pending in the court's electronic filing queue along with an amended objection to Will, and summons. Mr. Glickfield reports that he has provided Mr. Koplowitz copies of the previously mentioned documents via email. Mr. Koplowitz confirms receipt of the documents as well as his agreement to accept service via email.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Letters of Administration filed by Donald James, the Petition for Letters of Administration filed by Karen James, and the Petition for Probate of Will and Letters Testamentary are continued to August 18, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.

Off Calendar Apr-26-2021 Continued To May-24-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Leon Ainer III, via ZOOM, counsel for Donald James, Petitioner; Yaasha Sabba, via ZOOM, counsel for Karen James, via ZOOM, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court questions whether there are any objections to the court admitting the will to Probate. Mr. Ainer reports that his client does object and that he himself has not had a chance to verify the validity of the will to possibly file an objection or will contest. Mr. Sabba is amenable to a continuance to allow Mr. Ainer the time to file his papers.

The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testementary, Petition for Letters of Administration, Apppointment under IAEA and Petition for Letters of Administration are continued to May 24, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204. Mr. Ainer is instructed to submit a written objection or will contest to the court for filing by no later than May 17, 2021.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Robert Woods; Bailiff: Deputy Tauscher. Not Reported. (D204)
